title: Acupuncturists
description: Diagnose, treat, and prevent disorders by stimulating specific acupuncture points within the body using acupuncture needles. May also use cups, nutritional supplements, therapeutic massage, acupressure, and other alternative health therapies.

tasks.text: Maintain and follow standard quality, safety, environmental, and infection control policies and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Treat patients using tools, such as needles, cups, ear balls, seeds, pellets, or nutritional supplements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Adhere to local, state, and federal laws, regulations, and statutes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify correct anatomical and proportional point locations based on patients' anatomy and positions, contraindications, and precautions related to treatments, such as intradermal needles, moxibustion, electricity, guasha, or bleeding.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop individual treatment plans and strategies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Insert needles to provide acupuncture treatment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate treatment outcomes and recommend new or altered treatments as necessary to further promote, restore, or maintain health.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect medical histories and general health and lifestyle information from patients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain detailed and complete records of health care plans and prognoses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Educate patients on topics, such as meditation, ergonomics, stretching, exercise, nutrition, the healing process, breathing, or relaxation techniques.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess patients' general physical appearance to make diagnoses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze physical findings and medical histories to make diagnoses according to Oriental medicine traditions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consider Western medical procedures in health assessment, health care team communication, and care referrals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Dispense herbal formulas and inform patients of dosages and frequencies, treatment duration, possible side effects, and drug interactions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Apply heat or cold therapy to patients using materials, such as heat pads, hydrocollator packs, warm compresses, cold compresses, heat lamps, or vapor coolants.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Formulate herbal preparations to treat conditions considering herbal properties, such as taste, toxicity, effects of preparation, contraindications, and incompatibilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Treat medical conditions, using techniques such as acupressure, shiatsu, or tuina.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Apply moxibustion directly or indirectly to patients using Chinese, non-scarring, stick, or pole moxa.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
